content: ok but in all seriousness I think I misunderstood a text because it probably should just be a . and not ...
We have the new "Steal" wording (well technically just the formatting of the verb being new), how come Tawil's 4-wing doesn't get the same treatment ?

> Problem Fix
> [STR Steal]
> ● The in-battle description of the "STR Steal" effect is now clearly divided into "Strength Gain" and "Strength Reduction" sections, each benefiting from their respective bonuses.
> ● Fixed the inconsistency between the actual and displayed effects of "STR Steal": Previously, some descriptions of "STR Steal" incorrectly benefited from the "Strength Gain Effect" due to a numerical display error, causing the actual logic of the strength reduction effect to be inconsistent with the displayed description. The display error has now been corrected.
> ● The skill "Law of the Strongest" of the Awakener "Goliath" activates the effect description of Enlighten "Rule by the Strongest". The new effect description is: Temporarily remove all enemies' Strength and gain Temporary STR equal to the amount removed.
> ● Changed the icon for the "STR▼" effect to distinguish it from the "Strength Gain" effect.
it's a matter of in combat vs out of combat descriptions
sorry for pinging, just a reminder on this xD
